content.full_text:
May 7, 2001

Patrick Chandler
Constituent Affairs Representative
Office of Governor Gray Davis
State Capitol
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re: Brianna Carlson - Constituent Response
Our File No.: G-01-108

Dear Mr. Chandler:

Pursuant to our conversation of May 3, 2001, please find enclosed some background material relevant to Ms. Carlson’s question on Proposition 34, California’s newly-enacted campaign finance reform law.

As I advised during our telephone conversation, the Commission will not be responding directly to Ms. Carlson’s letter. However, please feel free to contact me should you have any additional questions in this regard at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel, Legal Division

LM:jg
Enclosures
